title: ACT static-profile MIME type values
description: Closed-enum schema for the `Content-Type` value the CDN serves for each static-profile resource. Provisional pending PRD-803 IANA registration; the values listed here are the strings producers and consumers MUST use in the interim. The `; profile=static` parameter on `application/act-manifest+json` is REQUIRED for static-profile manifests; PRD-106 owns the runtime variant. See PRD-105 and gap B5.

manifest.description: MIME type the CDN MUST serve at the well-known manifest path under the static profile.

index.description: MIME type the CDN MUST serve for the index file at the URL declared by `index_url`.

index_ndjson.description: MIME type for the NDJSON index file at `index_ndjson_url` (Plus only). The MIME type is the same as the JSON index because both encode the same logical data; consumers disambiguate by content (line-delimited vs single object) or by URL.

node.description: MIME type for individual node files.

subtree.description: MIME type for subtree files (Standard / Plus when subtree advertised).

error.description: MIME type for error envelopes. Rare under the static profile — typically only the CDN's own error pages, which ACT does not control. Listed here for completeness.
